name: Pizza Bread #2
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese, and Romano, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Make dough using DOUGH setting.
2. Let rest for 20-30 minutes.
3. Separate into as many balls as you want pizzas (or one 12-inch pizza), knead a little, and let rest for 10 minutes.
4. Shape into flat circles and place on a baking pan, pricking with a fork.
5. Let rest for 10 minutes at room temperature.
6. Brush with Pizza sauce, sprinkle with Mozzarella cheese and your favorite toppings (if you want bread to go with a meal, it is good with just the sauce).
7. Bake in a 400°F oven for 15-20 minutes or until golden.
